positive: A whimsical, stylized portrait of a roaring mythical lion sitting atop a crescent moon, viewed through a nebula sky. The lion has intricate, geometric markings and mane structure, embodying celestial power. Composition should be centered, with the lion's silhouette dominating the foreground. The background space is deep indigo and emerald green, dotted with stylized constellations and shooting stars. Use linework, graphic novel aesthetic, and modern Art Deco patterns integrated into the natural forms. Strong contrast, high saturation, designed for apparel printing, ultra-detailed, 8k, vector art style.
